title: Bank officer who is member of depositing board not to vote for his bank
doc_html:
§1233.  Bank officer who is member of depositing board not to vote for his bank

An officer of any bank who is a member of any board having authority to let public funds shall not cast any vote in favor of any bank of which he is an officer.
doc_text:
§1233.  Bank officer who is member of depositing board not to vote for his bank
An officer of any bank who is a member of any board having authority to let public funds shall not cast any vote in favor of any bank of which he is an officer.
